value.description: In Claude Code, you set the `model` config to either a convenient alias (e.g. `best`, `sonnet`, `opus`, `haiku`, `opusplan`) or a full model name/ARN/deployment depending on your provider. Aliases like `opusplan` can even switch models mid-task—using Opus during planning and Sonnet during execution—and automatically track the recommended version over time, or you can pin to an exact version.
value.label: Model aliases / `model` setting
